brand.name: Keeps
brand.vibe: Calm, premium, effortless, low-contrast, highly professional
brand.logo_instructions: Create a minimal geometric logo using an SVG. A sleek, sharp letter 'K' composed of two interlocking semi-transparent polygons, colored in muted silver and soft amber. Text 'Keeps' alongside it in Outfit font, tracking-tight.

gradients.page_background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 40%), radial-gradient(circle at bottom left, rgba(161,130,82,0.02) 0%, transparent 50%)

cards.classes: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-zinc-300 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-zinc-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 focus:border-white/30 placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all

layout.general: The 'Control Room' grid. Mobile-first responsive, generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
layout.sidebar: Fixed left, glassmorphic with very subtle right border. Width 260px on desktop.
layout.dashboard_grid: CSS Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6.

features.overview: Top summary cards (col-span-1) for Revenue, Expenses, Tax Liability. Main chart (col-span-2 or 3) using Recharts with soft curving lines.
features.invoice_engine: Glassmorphic form with multi-currency Select components. Include a visual PDF preview pane that looks like a frosted glass document.
features.tax_management: Bento box layout showing VAT, Withholding, Income. Use muted progress bars or soft radial charts.
features.ai_advisor: A floating action button (FAB) in bottom right that expands into a sleek 'floating glass sheet' modal/sidebar. Use backdrop-blur-3xl and a very subtle glowing border. OCR upload zone should look like a dashed glass box.
features.project_management: List of clients and milestones. Use avatars (from Unsplash) and soft status badges (e.g., bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400).
features.tax_sinking_fund: The 'Visual Vault'. A large, prominent circular progress indicator in the center of a card, with glowing muted gold accents, representing the amount safely set aside for taxes.
features.global_compliance: A minimalist list or interactive SVG map highlighting compliant regions in soft sage green.

avatars.description: Professional male avatar for dashboard top right
Professional female client avatar for project management

backgrounds.description: Abstract dark metallic/glass background for the login page to give a premium feel

animations.hover: All glass cards must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity on hover.
animations.page_load: Framer motion stagger children for dashboard cards. Fade and slide up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
animations.ai_advisor: Spring animation from bottom-right origin when expanding the glass sheet.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-400 against #09090C meets 4.5:1 ratio. Avoid using pure #000 or #FFF everywhere. Use subtle text-shadow if layered over the background image.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-invoice-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all layout and styling.
Use Shadcn UI but aggressively strip out the default 'card' white backgrounds and borders, replacing them with the defined 'Crystal Glass' styles (bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10).
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
For Recharts, use transparent backgrounds, no grid lines (or 5% opacity white), and soft muted colors (#E2E2E6, #4A6E59) for lines/bars.
Implement the 'Tax Sinking Fund' as a prominent visual widget, perhaps a circular SVG progress tracker with a soft glowing drop-shadow in #A18252.
The AI Advisor should literally be a floating panel (fixed bottom-right) that looks like a frosted piece of glass over the dashboard.
Do NOT use bright blues, purples, or neon colors. Stick strictly to the muted dark titanium, silver, and sage palette.
Include 'Hermes Software Inc.' subtly in the auth footer or dashboard bottom.
Implement Google OAuth button on the Auth page using a glassmorphic styling, keeping the Google icon but changing the button background to white/5.
